representation_context: synthetic illustration representing a cultural community for educational storytelling
governance_note: High-priority representation ethics review required. Representation integrity is limited. Strengthen voice agency, context, dignity, source accuracy, provenance, and accountability. Representation risk is elevated. Review stereotype tendency, exposure risk, context loss, voice replacement, power asymmetry, and governance. Consent adequacy is limited. Review informed consent, ongoing consent, use clarity, platform circulation, withdrawal, and reuse/AI clarity. Cultural/visual strength is limited. Review cultural protocols, community review, attribution, image context, visual dignity, and captions. AI representation risk is elevated. Review synthetic opacity, likeness imitation, cultural fabrication, provenance loss, evidence confusion, and human review. Escalate. Synthetic cultural representation has high stereotype, fabrication, provenance, evidence-confusion, and weak human-review risk.
